creator: jkim@FreeBSD.org
text:
On Wednesday 02 July 2008 07:29 pm, Jung-uk Kim wrote:
> Can you try the attached patch?  I don't know how that can happen
> but it should fix your problem.  You can just drop it in
> ports/java/jdk16/files directory and rebuild.

I think I know what's going on here.  Please remove the old patch and 
try the attached patches instead.

Thanks,

Jung-uk Kim
